name: Sesame-Oat Cinnamon Swirl Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Tightly packed dark brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine boiling water and rolled oats. Toast sesame seeds in a small fry pan over medium heat, stirring frequently, until golden (3-5 minutes). Stir seeds into the oat mixture.
2. Dissolve yeast in warm water; add brown sugar and let stand 5 minutes until yeast bubbles. Stir in butter, salt, and cooled oat mixture. Add whole wheat flour and beat in all-purpose flour until a stiff dough forms.
3. Let rest on lightly floured board for 10 minutes until smooth and satiny. Turn out onto a lightly greased bowl; turn over to grease the top. Cover and let rise until doubled (about 1 hour).
4. Punch down the dough and divide in half. Roll each into a rectangle measuring 8x12 inches, sprinkle with cinnamon, then roll tightly. Seal seams and ends.
5. Grease two 8-1/2x4-1/2 inches loaf pans. Let rise until doubled (about 45 minutes to 1 hour). Preheat oven to 375°F. Bake until loaves are golden and sound hollow when tapped (30-35 minutes).
6. Remove immediately from pans and cool on wire racks.
Makes 2 loaves; serves 24.
